name: sunrise-sunset
description: Get sunrise, sunset, solar noon, day length, and twilight times for any location and date. Use for questions like 'when is sunset today in Portland', 'what time does the sun rise in Tokyo', 'how long is the day on June 21 in London'. Accepts latitude and longitude coordinates.

input.description: Query parameters as JSON. Required: 'lat' (latitude), 'lng' (longitude). Optional: 'date' (YYYY-MM-DD, default today), 'formatted' (0 for ISO 8601 timestamps, 1 for 12-hour format).

output.description: JSON with 'results' containing 'sunrise', 'sunset', 'solar_noon', 'day_length', 'civil_twilight_begin', 'civil_twilight_end', 'nautical_twilight_begin', 'nautical_twilight_end', 'astronomical_twilight_begin', 'astronomical_twilight_end'. All times in UTC.
